title: The galaxy ultraviolet luminosity function from $z=7$ to $15$ in the COLIBRE simulations
summary: JWST has enabled the detection of galaxies in the earliest stages of cosmic history. We compare the ultraviolet luminosity functions (UVLFs) at redshifts $z=7-15$ predicted by the new cosmological hydrodynamics simulations, COLIBRE with observations, including those from JWST. The UV luminosities of COLIBRE galaxies are derived using the radiative transfer code SKIRT, which tracks stellar emission and its processing through the multi-phase interstellar medium and dust distribution predicted by COLIBRE. We find that although COLIBRE is consistent with the observed evolution of the stellar mass function up to $z=12$, its dust-attenuated UVLFs fall systematically below the observations at the bright end: at the number density of $10^{-6}\,\mathrm{Mpc^{-3}\,mag^{-1}}$, the brightest galaxies are underluminous by $\approx 1\,\rm mag$ at $z=7$, increasing to $\approx 2.5\,\rm mag$ at $z=15$. Accounting for observational uncertainties brings the COLIBRE UVLFs closer to the observational data, but does not fully resolve the discrepancy. Ignoring dust attenuation allows COLIBRE to produce sufficiently bright galaxies at $7\lesssim z \lesssim 12$, while at $z=15$, COLIBRE still underpredicts the luminosities of the brightest galaxies, indicating the need for additional physical mechanisms to boost the UV luminosities at the earliest cosmic epochs, such as a ''top-heavy'' stellar initial mass function. We fit the COLIBRE UVLFs with Schechter functions and calculate the evolution of the best-fit parameters. We find that the galaxy number density decreases, the characteristic luminosity becomes fainter and the faint-end slope becomes steeper towards higher redshifts. The UV luminosity density decreases by a factor of $\approx 300$ from $z = 7$ to $z = 15$.

AI.tldr: 本文利用COLIBRE宇宙学流体模拟与SKIRT辐射传输代码，预测了z=7-15的紫外光度函数，发现模拟预测的亮端星系亮度低于JWST观测值，尤其在z=15时差距达2.5星等，表明需要额外物理机制（如top-heavy IMF）来解释早期宇宙的明亮星系。
AI.motivation: JWST已能探测宇宙最早期的星系，但现有模拟是否能够重现观测到的紫外光度函数尚不明确，需要系统比较模拟预测与JWST观测数据，检验当前星系形成模型的合理性。
AI.method: 使用COLIBRE宇宙学流体模拟生成星系样本，再通过SKIRT辐射传输代码计算星系紫外光度（考虑星际介质和尘埃消光），将结果与JWST等观测的紫外光度函数进行对比分析。
AI.result: COLIBRE模拟的尘埃消光后紫外光度函数在亮端系统性低于观测：z=7时暗约1星等，z=15时暗约2.5星等。考虑观测不确定性可部分缓解但不完全消除差异。忽略尘埃消光后，z≤12亮端吻合，但z=15仍偏暗。
AI.conclusion: 当前模拟在最高红移（z=15）无法产生足够亮的星系，需要引入top-heavy IMF等额外物理机制。紫外光度密度从z=7到z=15下降约300倍，且高红移处暗端斜率更陡、特征光度更暗。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST使得探测宇宙最早期的星系成为可能。我们将新的宇宙学流体动力学模拟COLIBRE在红移z=7-15处预测的紫外光度函数（UVLFs）与包括JWST在内的观测结果进行了比较。COLIBRE星系的紫外光度是通过辐射传输代码SKIRT推导得出的，该代码追踪了恒星辐射及其在COLIBRE预测的多相星际介质和尘埃分布中的处理过程。我们发现，尽管COLIBRE与观测到的z=12以内的恒星质量函数演化一致，但其尘埃衰减后的UVLFs在亮端系统性地低于观测结果：在数密度为10^{-6}\,\mathrm{Mpc^{-3}\,mag^{-1}}处，最亮的星系在z=7时亮度约低1\,\rm mag，到z=15时增加到约2.5\,\rm mag。考虑观测不确定性使COLIBRE的UVLFs更接近观测数据，但并未完全解决差异。忽略尘埃衰减使得COLIBRE在7\lesssim z \lesssim 12时能产生足够亮的星系，而在z=15时，COLIBRE仍然低估了最亮星系的亮度，表明需要额外的物理机制来提升最早宇宙时期的紫外光度，例如“top-heavy”恒星初始质量函数。我们用Schechter函数拟合COLIBRE的UVLFs，并计算了最佳拟合参数的演化。我们发现，随着红移增加，星系数密度降低，特征光度变暗，暗端斜率变陡。紫外光度密度从z=7到z=15下降了约300倍。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，当前模拟在最高红移（z=15）无法产生足够亮的星系，需要引入top-heavy IMF等额外物理机制。紫外光度密度从z=7到z=15下降约300倍，且高红移处暗端斜率更陡、特征光度更暗。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Correlations between galaxy stellar mass and other global properties: (1) the total mass (including baryons, dark matter, and black holes; \(M_{tot}\) ; top row); (2) the mass of gas in the cool, dense phase (i.e. \(T 10^{-1}\,{cm}^{-3}\) ), denoted as \(M_{cg}\) (second row); (3) the instantaneous SFR (third row) and (4) the total dust mass, denoted as \(M_{dust}\) (bottom row) of the galaxies (above certain stellar mass limits; see Table 1 for minimum stellar masses for colibre simulations with different resolution) from the three colibre simulations at the selected redshifts. The correlations at different redshift are shown in the different columns ( \(z=7\) to \(z=15\) from left to right). The squares represent the median values of the corresponding quantity in the stellar mass bin, with the error bars indicating the 16th-84th percentile range (i.e. the \(\pm 1\sigma\) region). Good convergence is seen for all relations among the three colibre simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：星系恒星质量与其他全局性质之间的相关性：(1) 总质量（包括重子、暗物质和黑洞；\(M_{tot}\)；顶行）；(2) 冷密相气体质量（即\(T 10^{-1}\,{cm}^{-3}\)），记为\(M_{cg}\)（第二行）；(3) 瞬时SFR（第三行）；(4) 总尘埃质量，记为\(M_{dust}\)（底行），来自三个colibre模拟在所选红移处的星系（高于某些恒星质量限值；不同分辨率的colibre模拟的最小恒星质量见表1）。不同红移处的相关性显示在不同列中（从左到右为\(z=7\)到\(z=15\)）。方块表示恒星质量箱中相应量的中值，误差棒表示第16至第84百分位范围（即\(\pm 1\sigma\)区域）。三个colibre模拟的所有关系均显示出良好的收敛性。

For clarity, SFRs lower than \(10^{-5.25}\,{M_{\odot}\,yr^{-1}}\) are set to \(10^{-5.25}\,{M_{\odot}\,yr^{-1}}\) . The grid delineated by dotted lines indicates the boundaries of the stellar mass and SFR bins used in the sample selection. The colours represent the sampling fraction of galaxies (i.e., the ratio between the number of galaxies selected from a bin and the total number of galaxies in that bin). To make fair comparisons, all observational magnitudes and number densities are rescaled as described in the text. All observational UVLFs used in this work for comparison (uncorrected and together with their corresponding \(h_{obs}\) values) are available in machine-readable format on both the journal website and https://icc.dur.ac.uk/data/ .

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Correlations between the stellar mass of galaxies ( \(\log\,M_{\ast}\) ) and their UV magnitude, \(M_{UV}\) (solid: dust-attenuated; dashed: dust free) at different redshifts (as indicated in each panel). Results for L050m5, L200m6 and L400m7 are indicated by different colours. The squares represent the median \(M_{UV}\) in the stellar mass bins, with the error bars indicating the interval from the 16th to 84th percentiles ( \(\pm 1\sigma\) ) of \(M_{UV}\) in each stellar mass bin. colibre simulations with different resolutions show consistent \(M_{UV}-\log\,M_{\ast}\) relations across the redshift range \(z=7-15\) , especially for dust-free \(M_{UV}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同红移处（如每个面板所示）星系恒星质量（\(\log\,M_{\ast}\)）与其紫外星等\(M_{UV}\)之间的相关性（实线：尘埃衰减；虚线：无尘埃）。L050m5、L200m6和L400m7的结果用不同颜色表示。方块表示恒星质量箱中\(M_{UV}\)的中值，误差棒表示每个恒星质量箱中\(M_{UV}\)的第16至第84百分位（\(\pm 1\sigma\)）区间。不同分辨率的colibre模拟在红移范围\(z=7-15\)内显示出一致的\(M_{UV}-\log\,M_{\ast}\)关系，尤其是对于无尘埃的\(M_{UV}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of (dust-attenuated) UVLFs between the predictions of colibre (consisting of the UVLFs from three individual colibre simulations and their combined UVLFs; see Section 3.2.2 for details) and observational data from \(z=7\) to \(z=15\) (as indicated in the upper right corner of each panel). We remind readers that the redshifts here correspond to the colibre snapshots and are not the average redshifts of the observational data. Please see Section 2.4 for the selection criteria for the observational data and Table 3 for the list of selected observational datasets at each redshift. For the UVLFs from the three individual colibre simulations, we use dashed lines to indicate those portions that are not included in the combined UVLFs. In each panel, we overplot observational data, grouped into three categories: (i) JWST data with spectroscopically confirmed redshifts (filled green symbols), (ii) JWST data based on photometric redshifts (open green symbols), and (iii) photometric redshift-based measurements from earlier observations, such as HST (open black symbols). For clarity, we exclude data points labelled as upper or lower limits in the original paper.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：colibre预测的（尘埃衰减）UVLFs（由三个独立colibre模拟的UVLFs及其组合UVLFs组成；详见第3.2.2节）与从\(z=7\)到\(z=15\)（如每个面板右上角所示）的观测数据之间的比较。我们提醒读者，这里的红移对应colibre的快照，并非观测数据的平均红移。观测数据的选择标准见第2.4节，每个红移处所选观测数据集列表见表3。对于三个独立colibre模拟的UVLFs，我们用虚线表示未包含在组合UVLFs中的部分。在每个面板中，我们叠加了观测数据，分为三类：(i) 具有光谱确认红移的JWST数据（绿色实心符号），(ii) 基于测光红移的JWST数据（绿色空心符号），以及(iii) 基于早期观测（如HST）的测光红移测量（黑色空心符号）。为清晰起见，我们排除了原始论文中标记为上限或下限的数据点。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison of the combined dust-attenuated and dust-free colibre UVLFs with observational data. The shaded regions represent the \(\pm 1\sigma\) ) ranges, calculated using the bootstrap method by perturbing both the parent sample (from which our random sample processed with skirt is drawn) and the selected sample 1000 times (see Section 3.2.2 for details). The grey dashed curve in the \(z=15\) panel shows the dust-free UVLF of colibre at \(z=14\) , providing a more precise comparison with observations that are based on samples with redshifts close to 14 (e.g. Naidu et al. 2026 ). The symbols for the observational data are as in Fig. 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：组合的尘埃衰减和无尘埃colibre UVLFs与观测数据的比较。阴影区域表示\(\pm 1\sigma\)范围，通过自举法计算，对母样本（从中抽取经skirt处理的随机样本）和所选样本进行1000次扰动（详见第3.2.2节）。\(z=15\)面板中的灰色虚线曲线显示了colibre在\(z=14\)处的无尘埃UVLF，以便与基于红移接近14的样本的观测结果（例如Naidu等人2026年）进行更精确的比较。观测数据的符号与图4相同。

authors: Mithi A. C. de los Reyes
title: $V/σ$ Trends with Mass for Dwarf Galaxies from the Marvelous Massive Dwarfs Suite
summary: Galaxy formation scenarios can be interpreted through galaxy morphology and the level of rotational versus pressure support, quantified through the ratio of a galaxy's rotation speed to its velocity dispersion: $V/σ$. Observational studies of dwarf galaxies find that $V/σ$ does not strongly depend on environment, and may weakly depend on galaxy mass, which could shift our understanding of how dwarf galaxies form. We utilize the Marvelous Massive Dwarfs suite to examine whether $V/σ$ depends on mass in simulations, and understand how this varies for different baryonic components of the galaxy: HI gas, young stars ($<$ 1 Gyr) and old stars ($>$ 1 Gyr). We use a simulation sample of 67 isolated dwarf galaxies with M$_\star=10^6-10^9$ M$_\odot$ and produce line-of-sight maps for rotation speed and dispersion for different viewing angles of each galaxy. We find that $V/σ$ increases with mass, and that HI gas and young stars are more rotation-supported ($V/σ\approx 1-13$) while old stars are more dispersion-supported ($V/σ\approx 0.2-5$). This result is consistent with the scenario where young stars are born from dynamically cold gas in the interstellar medium and undergo dynamical heating over time. We quantify the effects of spatial resolution in observational determinations of $V/σ$ and find that existing observations using old stars may underestimate the intrinsic $V/σ$. We find a correlation between $V/σ_\mathrm{HI,global}$ and HI line profile shape that is qualitatively similar to previous simulation results, but we find higher $V/σ_\mathrm{HI,global}$ compared to prior work which found values $\lesssim 2$ for most galaxies in this mass range. Our results motivate future work to examine $V/σ$ and dwarf galaxy formation with different kinematic tracers of the galaxy.

AI.tldr: 本文利用模拟研究矮星系中旋转速度与速度色散比(V/σ)随质量的变化，发现V/σ随质量增加，HI气体和年轻恒星更倾向于旋转支持，而年老恒星更倾向于色散支持，并讨论了观测分辨率对V/σ测定的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解矮星系的形成机制，探究V/σ是否依赖于星系质量以及环境因素，并通过模拟验证观测研究中的争议。
AI.method: 使用Marvelous Massive Dwarfs模拟套件，选取67个孤立矮星系（恒星质量10^6-10^9 M⊙），生成不同视角下的线速度图和速度色散图，分析HI气体、年轻恒星（<1 Gyr）和年老恒星（>1 Gyr）的V/σ差异，并量化空间分辨率的影响。
AI.result: V/σ随质量增加；HI气体和年轻恒星的V/σ≈1-13（旋转支持为主），年老恒星V/σ≈0.2-5（色散支持为主）；观测分辨率低估了年老恒星的本征V/σ；HI全球V/σ与HI线轮廓形状存在相关性，但整体高于先前研究结果。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持年轻恒星由动态冷的星际介质气体形成并随时间经历动力学加热的图景；未来需使用不同运动学示踪物进一步研究V/σ与矮星系形成。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究矮星系的V/σ与质量关系，涉及HI气体和恒星运动学，与用户兴趣画像中的星际介质、冷气体、速度色散等关键词部分匹配，但核心主题是矮星系而非用户主要关注的高红移强引力透镜星系，且无强透镜、高红移动力学或核心作者重叠，因此评分较低。

recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配：使用模拟套件分析矮星系运动学，而非引力透镜或高红移观测方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配：作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等：对矮星系V/σ的示踪物差异和分辨率效应有贡献，但非用户领域前沿。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系形成场景可以通过星系形态以及旋转与压力支撑的程度来解读，后者通过星系旋转速度与其速度色散的比值 $V/σ$ 来量化。对矮星系的观测研究发现，$V/σ$ 并不强烈依赖于环境，可能对星系质量有弱依赖，这可能改变我们对矮星系形成方式的理解。我们利用 Marvelous Massive Dwarfs 模拟套件来检验在模拟中 $V/σ$ 是否依赖于质量，并理解这一依赖关系如何随星系的不同重子成分（HI 气体、年轻恒星（< 1 Gyr）和年老恒星（> 1 Gyr））而变化。我们使用一个包含 67 个孤立矮星系的模拟样本，其恒星质量 M$_\star=10^6-10^9$ M$_\odot$，并为每个星系的不同观测视角生成旋转速度和色散的视线方向图。我们发现 $V/σ$ 随质量增加而增大，并且 HI 气体和年轻恒星更倾向于旋转支撑（$V/σ\approx 1-13$），而年老恒星更倾向于色散支撑（$V/σ\approx 0.2-5$）。这一结果与年轻恒星由星际介质中动力学冷的气体形成并随时间经历动力学加热的图景一致。我们量化了空间分辨率对 $V/σ$ 观测测定的影响，发现现有使用年老恒星的观测可能低估了内在的 $V/σ$。我们发现 $V/σ_\mathrm{HI,global}$ 与 HI 谱线轮廓形状之间的相关性在定性上与之前的模拟结果相似，但我们发现 $V/σ_\mathrm{HI,global}$ 值更高，而先前工作发现该质量范围内大多数星系的该值 $\lesssim 2$。我们的结果激励未来使用不同的星系运动学示踪物来研究 $V/σ$ 和矮星系形成。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用总结：结果支持年轻恒星由动力学冷的气体形成并随时间经历动力学加热的图景；未来需使用不同运动学示踪物进一步研究 $V/σ$ 与矮星系形成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left panel shows the H i versus stellar mass relation for our sample of simulated galaxies (Massive Dwarfs, red markers) compared to observed galaxies from McQuinn et al. ( 2022 ) (black \(\times\) ’s) and Bradford et al. ( 2015 ) (black points). Most of the simulated and observed galaxies have M \({}_{HI}>\) M ⋆ (above the one-one black line), i.e., these galaxies are gas-rich. The middle panel shows how the H i versus stellar size limits imposed in our kinematic maps are comparable in range, but the H i disk generally extends further than the stellar disk as R \({}_{HI}>\) R 28 . Right panel shows the distribution of inclination angles for our simulated dwarf galaxies. We randomly draw values of \(\cos i\) from a uniform distribution, which results in higher inclinations for our sample on average.
figures.caption_zh: 图 1：左图展示了我们模拟星系样本（Massive Dwarfs，红色标记）的 HI 与恒星质量关系，与 McQuinn 等人（2022）的观测星系（黑色 \(\times\) 符号）和 Bradford 等人（2015）的观测星系（黑色点）进行比较。大多数模拟和观测星系的 M \({}_{HI}>\) M ⋆（位于黑色 1:1 线上方），即这些星系富含气体。中图展示了我们运动学图中施加的 HI 与恒星尺寸限制在范围上相当，但 HI 盘通常比恒星盘延伸得更远，即 R \({}_{HI}>\) R 28。右图展示了我们模拟矮星系倾角分布。我们从均匀分布中随机抽取 \(\cos i\) 值，这导致样本平均倾角较高。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left-most panels show mock UVI images of each galaxy oriented at an inclination angle of 45 ∘ . The right-most twelve panels show maps of LOS velocity (blue-red color map) and LOS velocity dispersion (purple-yellow color map) at an inclination of 45 ∘ . The black line on the bottom of each panel shows how we mask by radius, specifically R HI for H i gas and R 28 for stars. The top six panels show maps for r431-1, a disky galaxy, based on using H i (left), young stars (middle), and old stars (right) as tracers. The bottom six panels show maps for r488-1, an irregular galaxy. In both galaxies, the H i and old stars are more extended than young stars. For a disky galaxy like r431-1, with \(\log\) (M \({}_{\star}/\) M ⊙ )=8.95, gas and young stars exhibit rotation and old stars exhibit higher dispersions. r431-1 has a satellite, as seen in the upper-left, which is masked out after the cut by radius. For an irregular galaxy like r488-1, with \(\log\) (M \({}_{\star}/\) M ⊙ )=9.02, the H i and stars can exhibit different kinematics. r488-1 has rotating, disturbed H i gas, while old stars and young stars do not exhibit as much rotation and have smoother dispersion fields. To track these galaxies throughout the analysis, we will denote results for r431-1 with a black ‘ \(\times\) ’ and r488-1 with a black ‘+’ in subsequent plots.
figures.caption_zh: 图 2：最左侧面板展示了每个星系在倾角 45° 时的模拟 UVI 图像。最右侧十二个面板展示了在倾角 45° 时的 LOS 速度（蓝-红色图）和 LOS 速度色散（紫-黄色图）图。每个面板底部的黑线显示了如何按半径进行掩蔽，具体为 HI 气体使用 R HI，恒星使用 R 28。上方六个面板展示了 r431-1（一个盘状星系）基于 HI（左）、年轻恒星（中）和年老恒星（右）作为示踪物的图。下方六个面板展示了 r488-1（一个不规则星系）的图。在两个星系中，HI 和年老恒星比年轻恒星更延展。对于像 r431-1 这样的盘状星系，其 \(\log\) (M \({}_{\star}/\) M ⊙ )=8.95，气体和年轻恒星表现出旋转，而年老恒星表现出更高的色散。r431-1 有一个卫星，如左上角所示，在按半径切割后被掩蔽。对于像 r488-1 这样的不规则星系，其 \(\log\) (M \({}_{\star}/\) M ⊙ )=9.02，HI 和恒星可以表现出不同的运动学。r488-1 有旋转但受扰动的 HI 气体，而年老恒星和年轻恒星没有表现出那么多旋转，并且具有更平滑的色散场。为了在分析中追踪这些星系，我们将在后续图中用黑色‘ \(\times\) ’表示 r431-1 的结果，用黑色‘+’表示 r488-1 的结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: In each panel, the global H i kinematic value of our simulated galaxies from the Massive Dwarfs suite (red markers) are measured at a random inclination. The vertical error bars extend from the minimum to maximum value over all 31 viewing angles. The left panel shows the H i LOS velocity as a function of H i mass. We compare the simulation results to observed rotation speeds: V max from THINGS and LITTLE THINGS used in Oman et al. ( 2019 ) (blue markers) and W \({}_{{20}}/2\) from VLA-ANGST and THINGS used in Stilp et al. ( 2013 ) (black markers). There is overlap between Stilp et al. ( 2013 ) and Oman et al. ( 2019 ) for five galaxies: DDO 53, DDO 154, NGC 2366, DDO 154, NGC 7793, and IC 2574, and we show constraints from both works. In each panel, the black ‘ \(\times\) ’ shows the kinematic quantity for r431-1 (a disky galaxy in our simulated sample) and the black ‘ \(+\) ’ shows the result for r488-1 (an irregular galaxy), both of which are shown in Figure 2 . The right panel compares the global LOS velocity dispersion versus M HI . Generally our V HI,global and \(\sigma_{{HI,global}}\) values are consistent with observations. Finally, in the bottom panel we show the global LOS \(V/\sigma\) versus M HI . Our simulated sample has consistent \(V/\sigma_{{HI,global}}\) values as observed galaxies in the same mass range, in which the H i gas disks are mostly rotation-supported ( \(V/\sigma>1\) , shown with the horizontal black line).
figures.caption_zh: 图 3：在每个面板中，我们模拟星系（来自 Massive Dwarfs 套件，红色标记）的全局 HI 运动学值是在随机倾角下测量的。垂直误差棒延伸至所有 31 个视角的最小值和最大值。左图展示了 HI LOS 速度随 HI 质量的变化。我们将模拟结果与观测到的旋转速度进行比较：Oman 等人（2019）使用的 THINGS 和 LITTLE THINGS 的 V max（蓝色标记）以及 Stilp 等人（2013）使用的 VLA-ANGST 和 THINGS 的 W \({}_{{20}}/2\)（黑色标记）。Stilp 等人（2013）和 Oman 等人（2019）对五个星系有重叠：DDO 53、DDO 154、NGC 2366、DDO 154、NGC 7793 和 IC 2574，我们展示了两个工作的约束。在每个面板中，黑色‘ \(\times\) ’表示 r431-1（我们模拟样本中的一个盘状星系）的运动学量，黑色‘ \(+\) ’表示 r488-1（一个不规则星系）的结果，两者均在图 2 中展示。右图比较了全局 LOS 速度色散与 M HI。总体而言，我们的 V HI,global 和 \(\sigma_{{HI,global}}\) 值与观测一致。最后，底图展示了全局 LOS \(V/\sigma\) 与 M HI 的关系。我们的模拟样本与相同质量范围内的观测星系具有一致的 \(V/\sigma_{{HI,global}}\) 值，其中 HI 气体盘大多为旋转支撑（\(V/\sigma>1\)，用水平黑线表示）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Similar to Figure 3 but for the old stars (ages \(>\) 1 Gyr, shown in blue diamonds) and young stars (ages \( Wheeler et al. ( 2017 ) (open red squares) and Barba et al., in prep. (maroon circles; open for void galaxies, filled for field galaxies). Each kinematic quantity from simulated galaxies is taken at a randomly-drawn viewing angle, and the vertical error bars extend from the minimum and maximum value across all 31 viewing angles. The left panel demonstrates how the global LOS velocity in simulations is generally higher than in observations, likely as a result of better spatial resolution in the simulation data with our idealized moment maps. We examine the effect of spatial binning in Section IV . In the right panel, we find that old stars have higher LOS velocity dispersions than the young stars of the same galaxy. The dispersion range between old and young stars from simulated galaxies is generally consistent with observed values. However, 10 out of 32 of the observed galaxies (with lower opacity markers) have global stellar velocity dispersions which are higher (by a factor of up to 2.3) than what we find in simulations for old stars at a given stellar mass. We discuss potential sources of this discrepancy in Section VI.1 . The bottom panel demonstrates how higher dispersions for the older stars results in lower global \(V/\sigma\) values than for young stars. The horizontal black line shows \(V/\sigma_{\star,{global}}=1\) , below which most of the observed galaxies are dispersion-dominated, whereas only some of the simulated galaxies are dispersion-dominated at M \({}_{\star} ⊙ . It is possible that this discrepancy in \(V/\sigma\) is a result of different methodology rather than a physical result of galaxy support (Section IV ).
figures.caption_zh: 图 4：类似于图 3，但针对年老恒星（年龄 \(>\) 1 Gyr，蓝色菱形）和年轻恒星（年龄 \(<1\) Gyr，橙色菱形）。我们将模拟结果与 Wheeler 等人（2017）（空心红色方块）和 Barba 等人（准备中）（栗色圆圈；空心表示空洞星系，实心表示场星系）的观测进行比较。模拟星系的每个运动学量取自随机抽取的视角，垂直误差棒延伸至所有 31 个视角的最小值和最大值。左图展示了模拟中的全局 LOS 速度通常高于观测，这可能是由于我们理想化矩图模拟数据具有更好的空间分辨率。我们在第四节中检查了空间分箱的影响。在右图中，我们发现同一星系中年老恒星的 LOS 速度色散高于年轻恒星。模拟星系中年老和年轻恒星之间的色散范围与观测值总体一致。然而，32 个观测星系中有 10 个（透明度较低的标记）的全局恒星速度色散高于我们在给定恒星质量下对年老恒星的模拟结果（最高达 2.3 倍）。我们在第六节第 1 部分讨论了这种差异的可能来源。底图展示了年老恒星较高的色散导致其全局 \(V/\sigma\) 值低于年轻恒星。水平黑线表示 \(V/\sigma_{\star,{global}}=1\)，低于该线的大多数观测星系以色散为主，而只有部分模拟星系在 M \({}_{\star}<10^{8.5}\) M ⊙ 时以色散为主。这种 \(V/\sigma\) 的差异可能是不同方法学的结果，而非星系支撑的物理结果（第四节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Top panel shows \(V/\sigma\) versus total baryonic mass for each kinematic tracer (H i - red circles, old stars - blue diamonds, young stars - orange diamonds). We define M \({}_{{bary}}=1.4\) M \({}_{{HI}}+\) M ⋆ . Similar to Figures 3 and 4 , we show the \(V/\sigma\) at a randomly-drawn viewing angle, and the vertical error bars extend from the minimum and maximum value across all 31 viewing angles. The dark yellow diamonds denote galaxies which have young stellar maps with \(\leq 10\) particles per spaxel. The dotted lines show power-law fits to the data, with the parameters in Table 1 . The bottom panel shows histograms of \(V/\sigma\) . The H i and young stars in our galaxies exhibit \(V/\sigma\approx 1-13\) , whereas old stars exhibit \(V/\sigma\approx 0.2-5\) . These results are consistent with our picture of galaxy formation: H i is more rotation-supported (higher \(V/\sigma\) ) and cools to form young stars, which then become more dispersion-supported over time (lower \(V/\sigma\) ). Our result demonstrates how the global \(V/\sigma\) depends on which baryonic component is being studied for a given galaxy, and that the level of rotation support scales with galaxy mass.
figures.caption_zh: 图 5：顶图展示了每个运动学示踪物（HI - 红色圆圈，年老恒星 - 蓝色菱形，年轻恒星 - 橙色菱形）的 \(V/\sigma\) 与总重子质量的关系。我们将 M \({}_{{bary}}=1.4\) M \({}_{{HI}}+\) M ⋆。类似于图 3 和图 4，我们展示了随机抽取视角下的 \(V/\sigma\)，垂直误差棒延伸至所有 31 个视角的最小值和最大值。深黄色菱形表示年轻恒星图中每个空间像素粒子数 \(\leq 10\) 的星系。虚线显示了数据的幂律拟合，参数见表 1。底图展示了 \(V/\sigma\) 的直方图。我们星系中的 HI 和年轻恒星表现出 \(V/\sigma\approx 1-13\)，而年老恒星表现出 \(V/\sigma\approx 0.2-5\)。这些结果与我们星系形成的图景一致：HI 更倾向于旋转支撑（更高的 \(V/\sigma\)）并冷却形成年轻恒星，然后这些恒星随时间变得更以色散为主（更低的 \(V/\sigma\)）。我们的结果展示了对于给定星系，全局 \(V/\sigma\) 如何依赖于所研究的重子成分，并且旋转支撑的水平随星系质量变化。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Best-fit parameters of our data from Figure 5 to the power-law \(y=Ax^{b}\) , in which \(x=M_{{bary}}\) and \(y=V/\sigma\) . The RMS error (RMS) compares the power-law fit to simulation data, and the last column shows scatter in \(V/\sigma\) through the standard deviation (STD). Errors for each fit parameter ( \(b,A\) ) are determined using the diagonals of the covariance matrix, with a scaling factor of \(\chi^{2}/N\) , where \(N\) is the number of degrees of freedom.
figures.caption_zh: 表 1：图 5 数据对幂律 \(y=Ax^{b}\) 的最佳拟合参数，其中 \(x=M_{{bary}}\)，\(y=V/\sigma\)。RMS 误差（RMS）比较了幂律拟合与模拟数据，最后一列通过标准差（STD）展示了 \(V/\sigma\) 的弥散。每个拟合参数（\(b,A\)）的误差使用协方差矩阵的对角线确定，缩放因子为 \(\chi^{2}/N\)，其中 \(N\) 是自由度数量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: We assess whether higher \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\) is correlated with disky or oblate galaxies. Each row shows a different baryonic component: H i gas (top row, red), young stars (middle row, yellow), and old stars (bottom row, blue). A galaxy is considered disky based on the specific angular momentum vector of its stars (median \({j}_{z,\star}/j_{{tot}}>0.5\) ). Galaxies are oblate if the triaxiality of its stars is \(T i gas and young stars. In the right panel, we compare \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\) for disky galaxies and oblate galaxies. The grey dashed line shows \(V/\sigma_{{global}}=1\) . Disky/oblate galaxies indeed exhibit higher \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\) . Despite this correlation, a galaxy with higher \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\) and strong rotation does not exclusively mean that it is disky/oblate (see r488-1 in Figure 2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图 6：我们评估更高的 \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\) 是否与盘状或扁球状星系相关。每一行展示不同的重子成分：HI 气体（顶行，红色），年轻恒星（中间行，黄色），年老恒星（底行，蓝色）。一个星系被认为是盘状的，基于其恒星比角动量矢量（中值 \({j}_{z,\star}/j_{{tot}}>0.5\)）。如果恒星的三轴性 \(T<0.5\)，则星系为扁球状。左图展示了 \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\) 与 \(j_{z,\star}/j_{{tot}}\) 的关系。盘状星系（\(j_{z,\star}/j_{{tot}}>0.5\)）通常具有更高的 \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\)，特别是对于 HI 气体和年轻恒星。在右图中，我们比较了盘状星系和扁球状星系的 \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\)。灰色虚线表示 \(V/\sigma_{{global}}=1\)。盘状/扁球状星系确实表现出更高的 \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\)。尽管存在这种相关性，但具有更高 \(V/\sigma_{{global}}\) 和强旋转的星系并不一定意味着它是盘状/扁球状的（见图 2 中的 r488-1）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Kinematic maps of H i gas for r634-1 (a disky galaxy at \(i=52^{\circ}\) ). We compare the global values of LOS velocity and LOS velocity dispersion with high spatial resolution (0.175 kpc spaxels; left column), low spatial resolution (1 kpc spaxels; middle column), and Voronoi binning (variable bin sizes; right column). Top row: \(V_{{global}}\) can be underestimated as larger spaxels will ‘average out’ the LOS velocities per spaxel to a lower value. Voronoi binning typically results in larger spatial bins in the outer regions of the galaxy, and thus the global rotation velocity is lower than that of the 1-kpc map. Bottom row: similar to beam smearing, worse spatial resolution results in an artificially higher global velocity dispersion, as shown in the 1-kpc map. However, with Voronoi binning, spatial bins are larger in the outer regions of the galaxy which have lower dispersion, and therefore this decreases the global value.
figures.caption_zh: 图 7：r634-1（一个倾角 \(i=52^{\circ}\) 的盘状星系）的 HI 气体运动学图。我们比较了高空间分辨率（0.175 kpc 空间像素；左列）、低空间分辨率（1 kpc 空间像素；中列）和 Voronoi 分箱（可变箱大小；右列）下的全局 LOS 速度和 LOS 速度色散值。顶行：\(V_{{global}}\) 可能被低估，因为更大的空间像素会‘平均掉’每个空间像素的 LOS 速度，导致值更低。Voronoi 分箱通常导致星系外部区域的空间箱更大，因此全局旋转速度低于 1-kpc 图。底行：类似于波束涂抹，更差的空间分辨率导致人为更高的全局速度色散，如 1-kpc 图所示。然而，使用 Voronoi 分箱时，星系外部区域的空间箱更大，这些区域色散较低，因此降低了全局值。

title: Space as a spectroscopic laboratory: High-resolution spectroscopy of the [$^{13}$C II] hyperfine structure with SOFIA/upGREAT
summary: The [$^{12}$C II] emission at 158 $μ$m is a key cooling line of the interstellar medium and traces gas kinematics in spectrally resolved observations. Its spectral profile is often modified by optical depth effects. The intrinsic line shape can be reconstructed by comparison with emission from the less abundant $^{13}$C isotope. Due to the additional neutron spin, [$^{13}$C II] emission splits into three hyperfine structure (hfs) transitions. Laboratory measurements have provided the centroid frequency and the strongest component ($F=2-1$); the two weaker components ($F=1-0$ and $F=1-1$) have been inferred only from quantum-mechanical calculations. The magnetic-dipole hfs constants, from which the transition frequencies follow, have not been measured experimentally. The high spectral resolution of observations with the upgraded German Receiver for Astronomy at Terahertz Frequencies (upGREAT) on board SOFIA enabled simultaneous detection of all three hfs transitions. From these astronomical data we determine, for the first time, the magnetic-dipole hfs constants $A_{1/2}^{\rm hf} = 810.71(11)$ MHz and $A_{3/2}^{\rm hf} = 162.18(5)$ MHz of the [$^{13}$C II] $2s^2\,2p\,{}^2P^\circ$ ground term. Combined with the laboratory centroid frequency, this yields the rest frequencies of all three hfs lines. Using [$^{12}$C II] as a reference, we also improve the precision of the [$^{13}$C II] centroid frequency. This work shows that spectrally resolved astronomical observations can constrain fundamental atomic properties, with hfs precision rivaling laboratory measurements. The approach extends to other atomic and molecular transitions where laboratory data are difficult to obtain.

AI.tldr: 本文利用SOFIA/upGREAT望远镜的高分辨率观测，首次通过天文学方法实验测定了[$^{13}$C II] 158 μm三条超精细结构跃迁的磁偶极常数，并提高了其中心频率的精度，展示了天文观测在原子物理参数测量上的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: [$^{12}$C II] 158 μm发射线是星际介质的关键冷却线，但其谱线轮廓常受光学深度影响。通过与丰度较低的[$^{13}$CII]同位素比较可重建本征线形，但[$^{13}$C II]的超精细结构跃迁中两条弱组分的频率此前仅来自量子力学计算，缺乏实验测量，其磁偶极超精细结构常数从未被实验测定。
AI.method: 利用SOFIA搭载的升级版upGREAT接收机的高光谱分辨率观测，同时探测到[$^{13}$C II]的三条超精细结构跃迁。通过对天文数据的分析，首次实验测定了[$^{13}$C II]基项$2s^2\,2p\,{}^2P^\circ$的磁偶极超精细结构常数$A_{1/2}^{\rm hf}=810.71(11)$ MHz和$A_{3/2}^{\rm hf}=162.18(5)$ MHz。结合实验室测定的中心频率，确定了三条hfs线的静止频率。并以[$^{12}$C II]为参考，提高了[$^{13}$C II]中心频率的精度。
AI.result: 首次通过天文观测实验测定了[$^{13}$C II]的磁偶极超精细结构常数，精度可与实验室测量相媲美；同时提高了[$^{13}$C II]中心频率的测量精度。
AI.conclusion: 高光谱分辨率的天文观测能够用于约束基本原子性质，超精细结构常数测量精度可与实验室测量媲美。该方法可推广到其他难以通过实验室获取数据的原子和分子跃迁研究中。

artifacts.abstract_zh: [$^{12}$C II]在158 $μ$m处的发射是星际介质的关键冷却线，并在光谱分辨观测中示踪气体运动学。其光谱轮廓常受光学深度效应影响。通过与丰度较低的$^{13}$C同位素发射的比较，可以重建本征线形。由于额外的中子自旋，[$^{13}$C II]发射分裂为三条超精细结构（hfs）跃迁。实验室测量提供了质心频率和最强分量（$F=2-1$）；两个较弱分量（$F=1-0$和$F=1-1$）仅通过量子力学计算推断。决定跃迁频率的磁偶极hfs常数尚未通过实验测量。搭载于SOFIA的升级版德国太赫兹频率天文接收机（upGREAT）的高光谱分辨率观测，实现了所有三条hfs跃迁的同时探测。基于这些天文数据，我们首次确定了[$^{13}$C II] $2s^2\,2p\,{}^2P^\circ$基项的磁偶极hfs常数$A_{1/2}^{\rm hf} = 810.71(11)$ MHz和$A_{3/2}^{\rm hf} = 162.18(5)$ MHz。结合实验室质心频率，这给出了所有三条hfs线的静止频率。以[$^{12}$C II]为参考，我们还提高了[$^{13}$C II]质心频率的精度。这项工作表明，光谱分辨的天文观测可以约束基本原子性质，其hfs精度可与实验室测量相媲美。该方法可推广到其他难以通过实验室获取数据的原子和分子跃迁研究中。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，高光谱分辨率的天文观测能够用于约束基本原子性质，超精细结构常数测量精度可与实验室测量媲美。该方法可推广到其他难以通过实验室获取数据的原子和分子跃迁研究中。

title: Hidden Monsters with SPHEREx I: A goldmine for heavily reddened quasars at cosmic noon
summary: Heavily reddened quasars (HRQs) are luminous, dust-obscured broad-line quasars thought to represent a short-lived phase of intense black hole growth and feedback. Previous studies have been limited by small sample sizes, restricting robust statistical analysis. We expand the sample of the most luminous HRQs to enable population-level studies, connecting their spectral energy distributions (SEDs) to other quasar populations and placing them within an evolutionary sequence of massive galaxy and black hole formation. We assemble multiwavelength broadband photometry for the brightest HRQ candidates (K$_{AB}$ < 18 mag) and select AGN with red near-infrared colours (J-K)$_{AB}$ > 1.6. Using SPHEREx spectrophotometry, we confirm HRQs and determine redshifts. Detailed SED fitting allows comparison with other luminous quasars, including a control sample of hyper-luminous, unobscured Quaia quasars and luminous Hot Dust-Obscured Galaxies (Hot DOGs). We confirm 77 new HRQs with redshifts 1.5 < z < 3.9, dust-corrected optical continuum luminosities log$_{10}(λL_λ(3000A)$ [erg/s])>47.0, and line-of-sight extinctions 0.4 < E(B-V) < 1.6 (A$_V$ mag). This more than doubles the known HRQs at z > 1.5, including the first seven at z > 3. A UV excess consistent with scattered quasar emission is detected in 76% of HRQs. We show that HRQs are hot-dust poor compared to blue quasars of similar luminosity and redshift. Their 6um continuum luminosities are systematically fainter at fixed 3000A continuum luminosity relative to blue Quaia quasars, indicating deficiency in both hot and warm dust. These results support a scenario in which HRQs represent a blow-out phase, where strong feedback begins clearing obscuring material from central regions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过扩大样本量，确认了77颗新的大幅度红化类星体（HRQs），发现其热尘埃含量低于蓝类星体，支持HRQs是强反馈开始清除中心区域遮蔽物质的“吹出阶段”的演化图景。
AI.motivation: 以往对HRQs的研究受限于样本数量小，难以进行可靠的统计分析。本研究旨在扩大最亮HRQs样本，实现群体层面的研究，并将其置于大质量星系和黑洞形成的演化序列中。
AI.method: 收集最亮HRQ候选体的多波段宽频测光数据，以(J-K)_AB > 1.6的红色近红外颜色选择AGN；利用SPHEREx分光光度测量确认HRQ并确定红移；进行详细的SED拟合，并与未遮蔽的Quaia类星体和热尘埃遮蔽星系（Hot DOGs）等对照组进行比较。
AI.result: 确认了77颗新HRQs（红移1.5–3.9），使已知z>1.5的HRQ数量翻倍以上，包含首批7颗z>3的HRQ。76%的HRQ检测到与散射类星体辐射一致的UV过剩。HRQ在相同光度下比蓝类星体更缺乏热尘埃，6μm连续谱光度在固定3000Å光度下系统性更暗。
AI.conclusion: HRQs代表一种“吹出阶段”，其中强反馈开始清除中心区域的遮蔽物质，从而将其置于大质量星系和黑洞演化的序列中。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 重度红移类星体（HRQs）是明亮、尘埃遮蔽的宽线类星体，被认为代表黑洞剧烈增长和反馈的短暂阶段。以往研究受限于样本量小，难以进行稳健的统计分析。我们扩展了最明亮HRQ的样本，以实现群体层面的研究，将其光谱能量分布（SEDs）与其他类星体群体联系起来，并将其置于大质量星系和黑洞形成的演化序列中。我们为最亮的HRQ候选体（K$_{AB}$ < 18 mag）收集了多波段宽带测光数据，并选择了具有红色近红外颜色（J-K)$_{AB}$ > 1.6的活动星系核（AGN）。利用SPHEREx分光光度测量，我们确认了HRQ并确定了红移。详细的SED拟合允许与其他明亮类星体进行比较，包括一组超明亮、未遮蔽的Quaia类星体和明亮的暖尘埃遮蔽星系（Hot DOGs）。我们确认了77个新的HRQ，其红移1.5 < z < 3.9，尘埃校正后的光学连续谱光度log$_{10}(λL_λ(3000A)$ [erg/s])>47.0，视线消光0.4 < E(B-V) < 1.6（A$_V$ mag）。这使已知z > 1.5的HRQ数量增加了一倍以上，包括前七个z > 3的HRQ。在76%的HRQ中检测到与散射类星体发射一致的紫外超。我们表明，与相似光度和红移的蓝色类星体相比，HRQ的暖尘埃较少。在固定的3000Å连续谱光度下，它们的6微米连续谱光度系统性地比蓝色Quaia类星体更暗，表明热尘埃和暖尘埃均不足。这些结果支持一种情景，即HRQ代表一种“吹出阶段”，其中强反馈开始清除中心区域的遮蔽物质。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，HRQ代表一种“吹出阶段”，其中强反馈开始清除中心区域的遮蔽物质，从而将其置于大质量星系和黑洞演化的序列中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : The 2 \(\mu\) m hot-dust emission amplitude as a function of 6 \(\mu m\) continuum luminosity (left) for luminous Quaia quasars (grey) and HRQs (coloured circles). Density contours encircle 25, 50 and 68 per cent of the Quaia sample respectively. The hot-dust amplitudes of HRQs are systematically lower than Quaia quasars at a given MIR luminosity and show no clear dependence on the line-of-sight dust extinction, \(E(B-V)\) . We also present the 6 \(\mu m\) continuum luminosity as a function of the 3000Å continuum luminosity (right) for Quaia quasars (grey) and HRQs (red). HRQs are systematically off-set to lower MIR luminosities at a given accretion disk luminosity when compared to Quaia quasars and do not represent an extension of the Quaia distributions to higher luminosities. Taken together, this shows that HRQs are poor in both 2 \(\mu m\) and 6 \(\mu m\) dust relative to Quaia quasars of similar luminosity.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：2 \(\mu\)m热尘埃发射振幅与6 \(\mu m\)连续谱光度的关系（左图），针对明亮Quaia类星体（灰色）和HRQ（彩色圆圈）。密度等高线分别包围Quaia样本的25%、50%和68%。HRQ的热尘埃振幅在给定中红外光度下系统性地低于Quaia类星体，并且与视线尘埃消光\(E(B-V)\)无明显依赖关系。我们还展示了6 \(\mu m\)连续谱光度与3000Å连续谱光度的关系（右图），针对Quaia类星体（灰色）和HRQ（红色）。与Quaia类星体相比，HRQ在给定吸积盘光度下系统性地偏移到更低的中红外光度，并且不代表Quaia分布向更高光度的延伸。综合来看，这表明与相似光度的Quaia类星体相比，HRQ在2 \(\mu m\)和6 \(\mu m\)尘埃方面均较为贫乏。

title: CMB Limits on the Absorption of Light Vector and Axial-Vector Dark Matter
summary: Leptophilic sub-MeV spin-1 dark matter (DM) can be converted into a photon via inelastic scattering with a free electron or absorption by a neutral hydrogen atom in the primordial plasma. We study for the first time the impact of the energy injection resulting from such processes on cosmic microwave background (CMB) anisotropies. We obtain upper limits on the vector and axial-vector DM-electron couplings using Planck 2018 temperature, polarization, and lensing data for DM masses between 100 eV and 100 keV. We find that, due to the suppression of the hydrogen atomic form factor at high energies, inelastic scattering provides the dominant constraint for DM masses above the keV scale. At lower masses, hydrogen ionization through DM absorption is the leading channel, driven by the higher efficiency of post-recombination energy injection in modifying the free-electron fraction. Although the bounds we derive are considerably weaker than existing laboratory and astrophysical limits, they provide a robust and independent cosmological probe of leptophilic DM interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文首次研究了轻子型亚MeV自旋1暗物质通过非弹性散射或氢原子吸收在 primordial 等离子体中注入能量对CMB各向异性的影响，并利用Planck 2018数据给出了暗物质-电子耦合的上限。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 轻子型亚MeV自旋-1暗物质（DM）可以通过与原始等离子体中的自由电子发生非弹性散射或被中性氢原子吸收而转化为光子。我们首次研究了此类过程产生的能量注入对宇宙微波背景（CMB）各向异性的影响。利用普朗克2018年的温度、极化和透镜数据，我们获得了暗物质质量在100 eV至100 keV范围内矢量及轴矢量DM-电子耦合的上限。我们发现，由于高能下氢原子形状因子的抑制，非弹性散射为keV尺度以上暗物质质量提供了主要约束。在较低质量下，通过暗物质吸收导致的氢电离是主导通道，这归因于再复合后能量注入在改变自由电子分数方面具有更高的效率。尽管我们推导的约束比现有的实验室和天体物理极限弱得多，但它们为探测轻子型暗物质相互作用提供了一种稳健且独立的宇宙学探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：虽然约束较弱，但提供了一种稳健且独立的宇宙学探针，用于探测轻子型暗物质相互作用。

title: First Interstellar Detection of Methyl Carbamate: A New Observational Anchor for Glycine Chemistry
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, accepted for publication in ApJL
summary: Glycine-the simplest amino acid-has remained undetected in the interstellar medium despite decades of sensitive searches, motivating alternative approaches to constrain its astrochemical origin. A promising strategy is to investigate the broader $\rm C_{2}H_{5}O_{2}N$ isomer family and identify detectable members that can serve as observational anchors for glycine-related chemistry. Herein, we report the first robust interstellar detection of methyl carbamate toward the hot molecular core G358.93-0.03 MM1 using ALMA 1 mm observations. Ten unblended rotational transitions are identified, yielding a column density of (4.21$\pm0.84)\times10^{15} \rm cm^{-2}$ and an excitation temperature of $204\pm10$ K. We also searched for other $\rm C_{2}H_{5}O_{2}N$ isomers with available rotational spectroscopic data, including glycine, but none were detected, allowing us to derive upper limits on their column densities. The resulting abundance pattern deviates significantly from the Minimum Energy Principle predictions, highlighting that the $\rm C_{2}H_{5}O_{2}N$ family is shaped primarily by kinetic chemical process rather than thermodynamic equilibrium. The observed methyl carbamate abundance is consistent with a grain-surface formation scenario involving radical-radical recombination ($\rm CH_{3}$O + $\rm NH_{2}$CO), further supported by its correlated abundances with its proposed precursors, methanol and formamide, across diverse astrophysical environments. This detection establishes methyl carbamate as a new observational anchor for glycine chemistry, providing critical constraints on the formation pathways of amino-acid-related molecules in star-forming regions.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA望远镜在热分子核G358.93-0.03 MM1中首次稳健探测到氨基甲酸甲酯（甲基氨基甲酸酯），未检测到甘氨酸等其他C2H5O2N异构体，表明该异构体家族主要由动力学化学过程而非热力学平衡塑造，氨基甲酸甲酯可作为甘氨酸化学的新观测锚点。
AI.motivation: 甘氨酸作为最简单的氨基酸，在星际介质中历经数十年高灵敏度搜寻仍未被探测到，亟需替代方案来约束其天体化学起源。研究其更广泛的C2H5O2N异构体家族并识别可探测成员，可作为甘氨酸相关化学的观测锚点。
AI.method: 利用ALMA 1毫米波段对热分子核G358.93-0.03 MM1进行观测；识别10条未混叠的氨基甲酸甲酯转动跃迁；对其它具有转动光谱数据的C2H5O2N异构体（包括甘氨酸）进行搜寻并给出柱密度上限；比较观测丰度模式与最小能量原理（MEP）预测。
AI.result: 氨基甲酸甲酯柱密度为(4.21±0.84)×10^15 cm^-2，激发温度204±10 K；未检测到甘氨酸等其他异构体；观测丰度模式与最小能量原理预测严重偏离；氨基甲酸甲酯丰度与其前体甲醇和甲酰胺在多种天体环境中呈现相关性。
AI.conclusion: C2H5O2N异构体家族主要由动力学化学过程而非热力学平衡主导；支持氨基甲酸甲酯通过颗粒表面CH3O + NH2CO自由基-自由基复合生成的机制；该探测建立了氨基甲酸甲酯作为甘氨酸化学的新观测锚点，为星形成区中氨基酸相关分子的形成路径提供了关键约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 甘氨酸——最简单的氨基酸——尽管经过数十年的灵敏搜索，在星际介质中仍未检测到，这促使人们采用替代方法来限制其天体化学起源。一种有前景的策略是研究更广泛的C₂H₅O₂N异构体家族，并识别可作为甘氨酸相关化学观测锚点的可检测成员。在此，我们报告了利用ALMA 1毫米观测首次在热分子核G358.93-0.03 MM1中稳健地星际检测到氨基甲酸甲酯。识别出十条未混合的转动跃迁，得到柱密度为(4.21±0.84)×10¹⁵ cm⁻²，激发温度为204±10 K。我们还搜索了其他具有可用转动光谱数据的C₂H₅O₂N异构体，包括甘氨酸，但均未检测到，从而推导出其柱密度的上限。所得丰度模式显著偏离最小能量原理的预测，突显C₂H₅O₂N家族主要由动力学化学过程而非热力学平衡塑造。观测到的氨基甲酸甲酯丰度与涉及自由基-自由基复合（CH₃O + NH₂CO）的颗粒表面形成情景一致，并得到其与拟议前体甲醇和甲酰胺在不同天体物理环境中相关丰度的进一步支持。这一检测确立了氨基甲酸甲酯作为甘氨酸化学的新观测锚点，为星形成区中氨基酸相关分子的形成路径提供了关键约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，C₂H₅O₂N异构体家族主要由动力学化学过程而非热力学平衡主导；支持氨基甲酸甲酯通过颗粒表面CH₃O + NH₂CO自由基-自由基复合生成的机制；该探测建立了氨基甲酸甲酯作为甘氨酸化学的新观测锚点，为星形成区中氨基酸相关分子的形成路径提供了关键约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: MC emission toward G358.93 MM1. Black histograms show the spectra extracted at the offset position described in Appendix A . Red curves represent the best-fit LTE model for MC, while blue curves indicate the full spectral model including all other species identified toward this source. Green dashed lines mark the 3 \(\sigma\) noise level. Red asterisks highlight the ten MC transitions that are unblended and used to derive the molecular parameters. The inset shows the molecular structure of MC (C: gray; O: red; N: blue; H: white).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：朝向G358.93 MM1的MC发射。黑色直方图显示在附录A所述偏移位置提取的光谱。红色曲线表示MC的最佳拟合LTE模型，蓝色曲线表示包括朝向该源识别的所有其他物种的完整光谱模型。绿色虚线标记3 \(\sigma\) 噪声水平。红色星号突出显示十条未混合且用于推导分子参数的MC跃迁。插图显示MC的分子结构（C：灰色；O：红色；N：蓝色；H：白色）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Abundances relative to H 2 for C 2 H 5 O 2 N isomers as a function of relative energy ( \(\Delta E\) ). Symbols denote measurements toward G358.93 MM1 and G+0.693-0.027, while arrows indicate 3 \(\sigma\) upper limits. The red and cyan lines show the abundance trends predicted from the MEP for G358.93 MM1 and G+0.693-0.027, respectively, constructed using representative kinetic temperatures and adopting \(syn\) -GA as a reference. For G358.93 MM1, \(T_{kin}\) = 172 K was adopted from CH 3 CN (C. L. Brogan et al., 2019 ) , while for G+0.693-0.027, \(T_{kin}\) = 100 K was adopted from S. Zeng et al. ( 2018 ) . Abundances for G+0.693-0.027 are taken from V. M. Rivilla et al. ( 2023 ) . Labels indicate MC as methyl carbamate (CH 3 OC(O)NH 2 ), while GC, GA, and AHA represent glycine (NH 2 CH 2 C(O)OH), glycolamide (HOCH 2 C(O)NH 2 ), and acetohydroxamic acid (CH 3 C(O)NHOH), respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：C₂H₅O₂N异构体相对于H₂的丰度作为相对能量（\(\Delta E\)）的函数。符号表示朝向G358.93 MM1和G+0.693-0.027的测量值，箭头表示3 \(\sigma\) 上限。红色和青色线分别显示根据MEP预测的G358.93 MM1和G+0.693-0.027的丰度趋势，采用代表性动力学温度并以\(syn\) -GA为参考构建。对于G358.93 MM1，采用来自CH₃CN的\(T_{kin}\) = 172 K（C. L. Brogan等人，2019），而对于G+0.693-0.027，采用来自S. Zeng等人（2018）的\(T_{kin}\) = 100 K。G+0.693-0.027的丰度取自V. M. Rivilla等人（2023）。标签表示MC为氨基甲酸甲酯（CH₃OC(O)NH₂），而GC、GA和AHA分别代表甘氨酸（NH₂CH₂C(O)OH）、乙醇酰胺（HOCH₂C(O)NH₂）和乙酰氧肟酸（CH₃C(O)NHOH）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Abundance constraints for methyl carbamate (MC) across different environments. a) MC abundance relative to H 2 . b) MC abundance relative to NH 2 CHO. c) MC abundance relative to CH 3 OH. Red circles denote the values derived in this work toward the hot molecular core G358.93 MM1. Cyan circles represent upper limits from previous observations of hot corinos and the Galactic center cloud G+0.693-0.027, while purple diamonds indicate predictions from the astrochemical models of D. Sahu et al. ( 2020 ) . The red shaded regions indicate the one order of magnitude uncertainty range associated with the MC abundance measured in this work, shown for reference across panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同环境中氨基甲酸甲酯（MC）的丰度约束。a) MC相对于H₂的丰度。b) MC相对于NH₂CHO的丰度。c) MC相对于CH₃OH的丰度。红色圆圈表示本工作朝向热分子核G358.93 MM1推导的值。青色圆圈表示来自热核周盘和银河系中心云G+0.693-0.027先前观测的上限，紫色菱形表示来自D. Sahu等人（2020）天体化学模型的预测。红色阴影区域表示与本工作中测量的MC丰度相关的一个数量级不确定性范围，在各面板中作为参考显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: (a) ALMA 1 mm continuum map of G358.93 MM1 and integrated intensity (Moment-0) maps of MC. Contours are shown at (20, 40, 80, 120, 200, 500, 1000, 1700) \(\times\sigma\) , where \(\sigma\) is the rms noise measured in line-free regions. The synthesized beam (0.15 \({}^{\prime\prime}\times 0.10^{\prime\prime}\) , position angle = -87.1 ∘ ) is presented as the white ellipse. The continuum peak is marked by the white cross, and the spectrum-extraction position adopted in this work is marked by the red cross. Each panel displays the upper level energy \(E_{u}\) above the map. (b)-(k) Integrated-intensity (moment-0) maps of MC toward G358.93 MM1, overlaid with the 1 mm continuum emission contours. The color scale unit is Jy beam -1 km s -1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：(a) G358.93 MM1的ALMA 1毫米连续谱图和MC的积分强度（矩0）图。等高线显示在(20, 40, 80, 120, 200, 500, 1000, 1700) \(\times\sigma\) 处，其中\(\sigma\) 是无线区域测量的均方根噪声。合成波束（0.15 \({}^{\prime\prime}\times 0.10^{\prime\prime}\)，位置角 = -87.1°）以白色椭圆表示。连续谱峰值以白色十字标记，本工作采用的光谱提取位置以红色十字标记。每个面板显示图上方的上能级能量\(E_{u}\)。(b)-(k) 朝向G358.93 MM1的MC积分强度（矩0）图，叠加1毫米连续谱发射等高线。颜色标度单位为Jy beam⁻¹ km s⁻¹。
